title: Former Tallest Building in Seattle - Review of Smith Tower Visitor Experience, Seattle, WA - Tripadvisor
content: # Former Tallest Building in Seattle - Smith Tower Visitor Experience. # Former Tallest Building in Seattle. If you want to see Seattle, I highly recommend Smith Tower (“Tower”). The Tower in the earliest day was the tallest building before the Space Needle. At first , they’re four (4) people but we didn’t come at the same time on the elevator. I ended up having the observatory and the bar for myself. I have been to different observatories around the world, this was the first time I had it for myself. You’ll pass the historical figures resided in the It was brilliant idea to see the Seattle City streets from above. Columbia H, General Manager at Smith Tower Visitor Experience, responded to this review Responded March 26, 2023. We are proud to boast the title of the only open air observatory in Seattle. We look forward to you visiting again, and including you in our history here at the Smith Tower.
